title: abies pinsapo subsp. hispanica
intro: Abies pinsapo subsp. hispanica, also known as Spanish fir, is a subspecies of coniferous tree native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Spanish fir include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for colds and flu. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or inhaled for their therapeutic benefits.
